query:
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(response_size), 0)::BIGINT as "sum!"
            FROM (
                SELECT id, response_size
                FROM requests
                WHERE batch_id = $1
                  AND state = $2
                UNION ALL
                SELECT id, response_size
                FROM requests_archive
                WHERE batch_id = $1
                  AND state = $2
                  AND NOT EXISTS (
                      SELECT 1 FROM requests r WHERE r.id = requests_archive.id
                  )
            ) request_rows
